scripts.typecheck: tsc --allowJs --checkJs --noEmit --strict false --types node --typeRoots ../../node_modules/@types --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target es2022 server.mjs relay.mjs contracts.mjs response-contracts.mjs quiz-fetch-contracts.mjs
scripts.lint: eslint --config ../../apps/desktop/eslint.config.mjs server.mjs relay.mjs contracts.mjs response-contracts.mjs quiz-fetch-contracts.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
